subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! Hearken thou unto this Call from the direction of the Prison of the Lord of Names, and fix thy gaze upon this most exalted Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی از شطر سجن مالک اسماء این ندا بشنو و باینکلمه علیا ناظر باش
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @nearness and remoteness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort
